title: Command Cockpit Lane Cartridge Rail
summary: Compressed the desktop Command Cockpit lane rail into shorter level-select cartridges so more money paths are visible before rail scrolling.
proof: Reduced cockpit lane-card height, padding, avatar size, repeated realm text, and redundant state badge chrome while preserving lane identity.
Kept compact level, gate, win, live, and signal-pip state visible on every lane cartridge.
Scoped the compression to the Command Cockpit desktop rail so mobile keeps its existing horizontal launch strip.
